attributes.title: Kafka — app publish & consume
attributes.description: Java/Rust publishers and Java/Python/Rust consumers for create-user and create-item. Filter by request_id to correlate with HTTP and Postgres.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"(service: (webserver-benchmark-java or webserver-benchmark-python or webserver-benchmark-rust)) and (kafka_event: * or message: (*Kafka* or *create-user* or *create-item* or *kafka message* or *create_user_consumer* or *create_item_consumer*) or controller: (*Kafka* or create_user_consumer or create_item_consumer or CreateUserEvent* or CreateItemEvent*))","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
